extraction.one_line_summary: NIZZOLO Giacomo won bunch sprint after teammate AFFINI Eduardo's leadout nearly held for solo victory, losing only 15m from line.
tactical_patterns: AFFINI's time trial engine from leadout nearly stole victory, caught only 15m from line suggesting TT specialists underutilized in sprint leadouts.
Belgian DEBUSSCHERE attack with 50km triggered peloton wakeup that forced break's recapture earlier than teams wanted at 7km out.
NIZZOLO broke 16-podium winless streak, indicating mental barrier or tactical positioning issues finally resolved in home Giro sprint.

rider_signals.AFFINI Eduardo: positive: time trial power nearly held off sprinters from leadout position until final 15 meters
rider_signals.NIZZOLO Giacomo: positive: finally converted after record 16 Giro podiums without winning, suggests tactical adjustment or equipment change
rider_signals.GAVIRIA Fernando: negative: finished fifth despite being best at intermediate sprints, positioning failure in finale
rider_signals.VIVIANI Elia: negative: home roads Verona advantage failed to materialize despite Olympic flag bearer announcement boost
